# Release Notes

Updated page introduction and layout copy.

## 1.2.3

- Added MCP server permission controls for agent workflows.
- Improved sandbox recovery for long-running coding sessions.

## 1.2.0

- Breaking change: migrated project settings to the new hooks schema.
- Deprecated legacy slash-command locations.
- Added migration warnings for custom agent workflow configuration.
